covers.rationale: Different sales teams often need distinct pipeline stages; flexibility prevents forcing one-size-fits-all workflows.

covers.text: Assign win probability to opportunities manually or via predictive scoring.
covers.rationale: Probability-weighted forecasts are more accurate than raw pipeline values for revenue planning.

covers.text: Record expected close date and forecast amount for each opportunity.
covers.rationale: These core fields enable sales managers to forecast revenue and manage pipeline timing.

covers.text: Enable multi-user collaboration with defined owner, team members, and manager visibility.
covers.rationale: Clear ownership and visibility prevent gaps and ensure accountability across the sales team.

covers.text: Display pipeline visually with drag-and-drop stage transitions for opportunities.
covers.rationale: Visual pipeline management improves usability and makes stage progression intuitive for sales staff.

covers.text: Track competitor names and details associated with each opportunity.
covers.rationale: Competitor intelligence helps sales teams refine strategy and understand win/loss patterns.

covers.text: Capture lost-opportunity reason codes and enable lost-deal analysis.
covers.rationale: Lost-deal insights reveal process gaps and competitive weaknesses for continuous improvement.

module_sme_rollup.name: Customer Foundation
module_sme_rollup.description: Unified customer records with complete interaction history and consent management.

statements.text: Create and maintain customer accounts with multiple addresses, contact roles, and account hierarchies.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth for customer data

statements.text: Detect and merge duplicate customer records with approval workflow to ensure data quality.
Maintain unified activity feed of all customer interactions, transactions, and communications.
statements.rationale: Complete customer context for all teams

statements.text: Capture and enforce GDPR and PDPA consent flags with automated retention and deletion policies.
Log all calls, meetings, emails, and notes with outcomes and due-date reminders.

module_sme_rollup.name: Sales Pipeline & Execution
module_sme_rollup.description: Lead-to-opportunity conversion with flexible pipeline stages and collaborative forecasting.

statements.text: Capture leads from web forms, email, imports, and phone with automatic qualification and assignment.
Score leads using rules and predictive models to prioritize follow-up and conversion.
Convert leads to opportunities while maintaining complete history and audit trail.
statements.rationale: Preserve lead source and engagement data

statements.text: Configure flexible sales stages by team or product line with drag-and-drop pipeline visualization.
Assign win probability and expected close date with multi-user collaboration and manager visibility.
Link opportunity line items to products with configurable pricing and competitor tracking.
statements.rationale: Connect deals to revenue and competitive context

module_sme_rollup.name: Pricing, Orders & Revenue
module_sme_rollup.description: Flexible pricing, order management, and revenue recognition with approval controls.

statements.text: Maintain multiple price lists by customer group, region, and currency with volume discounts.
Configure discount approval workflows with role-based thresholds to protect margin.
Create orders with line items, quantities, and prices; generate and send invoices by email.
Track order status from pending through delivery with complete audit trail and customer visibility.
Create quotations, convert accepted quotes to orders, and handle amendments with templates.
Automatically generate recurring invoices on configured billing schedule with pro-rated adjustments.

module_sme_rollup.name: Customer Engagement & Retention
module_sme_rollup.description: Marketing automation, service delivery, and loyalty programs to drive retention.

statements.text: Build and send email campaigns with personalization and segment customers by behavior and purchase history.
Automate customer journeys with trigger-based workflows across email, SMS, and push notifications.
Create and track support cases with priority, SLA monitoring, and automatic escalation.
statements.rationale: Deliver consistent service and meet commitments

statements.text: Route cases by round-robin or skill match with knowledge base access and customer self-service portal.
Define loyalty programs with points earning, tiered membership, and automated reward fulfillment.
Send satisfaction surveys automatically at lifecycle events and track NPS and CSAT trends.

module_sme_rollup.name: Sales Intelligence & Insights
module_sme_rollup.description: Real-time dashboards, predictive analytics, and actionable recommendations.

statements.text: Display pipeline funnel analysis with conversion rates by stage, product, rep, and source.
Provide role-based dashboards with drill-down from summary to detailed transactions.
statements.rationale: Tailored insights for each user level

statements.text: Calculate sales velocity, customer lifetime value, and acquisition cost by source.
Score leads and opportunities with confidence levels and recommend next actions per contact.
statements.rationale: Prioritize effort and guide daily engagement

statements.text: Predict customer churn and identify at-risk accounts for proactive retention focus.

module_sme_rollup.description: Mobile access, data security, and seamless system integration.

statements.text: Provide web and native mobile access with responsive design for all devices.
Integrate click-to-dial, SMS, and live chat with automatic call logging and recording.
Synchronize data across Sales, Inventory, and Accounting modules with API access.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth across business
